rulings.Case Title: ANNA GATTI VS. CHARLES FERGUSON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion To Quash Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 22, 2015, line 1. DEFENDANT (CONSOLIDATED CASE) ANNA GATTI's Motion To Quash Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records transferred to department 301 to be heard on November 3, 2015 at 9:00 a.m. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: RON NICHOLS VS. YEE NAN LAU
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 22, 2015, line 2. DEFENDANTS YEE LAU and YUQUING LAU's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED. Plaintiffs may plead alternative theories of recovery. The complaint adequately alleges defendants' unlawful business practices. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: RON NICHOLS VS. YEE NAN LAU
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defendants Motion To Strike
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 22, 2015, line 2. DEFENDANTS YEE LAU and YUQUING LAU's Motion To Strike First Amended Complaint DENIED. The complaint pleads sufficient facts to support a prayer for punitive damages. Punitive damages are available, at a minimum, on the Ninth and Tenth causes of action. Attorneys' fees are also available on multiple causes of action. Plaintiff does not request nonrestitutionary disgorgement. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: CENVEO CORPORATION VS. FURNITURE CITY PLUS, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Notice Of Motion To Set Aside 1. The Clerks Entry Of Default And The Courts Entry Of Juudgment And 2. The Courts Entry Of Judgment Against Furniture City Plus, Inc.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 22, 2015, line 3. DEFENDANT FURNITURE CITY PLUS, INC.'S Motion To Set Aside Default and Default Judgment Hearing Required. Anh Nguyen to be present. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: KURT LESSWING VS. COURTNEY SEASHOLS **(regular civil case)**
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Third Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 22, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANT COURTNEY SEASHOLS' Motion To Quash Service Of Third Amended Complaint DENIED. Defendant has submitted to Court's jurisdiction when Defendant generally appeared in this action. The Court construes this motion as a motion to strike under CCP 436(b) and GRANTS the motion to strike. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: KURT LESSWING VS. COURTNEY SEASHOLS **(regular civil case)**
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Approving Previously Filed Third Amended Complaint Or In The Alternative To File Third Amended Complaint Anew
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 22, 2015, line 4. PLAINTIFF KURT LESSWING's Motion For Order Approving Previously Filed Third Amended Complaint Or In The Alternative To File Third Amended Complaint Anew GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion to approve September 29, 2015 filing of Third Amended Complaint is DENIED. Motion for leave to file Third Amended Complaint is GRANTED. = (501/RBU)
